name: Crostini Di Polenta Alla Pizzaiola (Polenta & Tomato Sauc
recipeIngredient: 6 Ripe tomatoes, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the olive oil in a medium-sized skillet over low heat. Sauté the garlic gently until it begins to turn color.
2. Add the tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Cook uncovered for 10 minutes or until the tomatoes lose their juices.
3. Stir in the parsley.
4. Preheat the broiler.
5. Cut the cooked polenta into 2-inch squares and brush them with a light wash of oil.
6. Broil the polenta squares until they are firm and lightly crisp, with a bit of a crust on the first side (about 3-5 minutes).
7. Turn the squares over and spread with the tomato mixture.
8. Broil for an additional 5 to 7 minutes.
9. Serve immediately.
